prompt: A vibrant, high-contrast Y2K fashion photography shot of two young East Asian adults. In the foreground, a young woman smiles softly at the camera, wearing a fuzzy pink bucket hat, a pastel patchwork crop top, a white pleated mini skirt, and a beaded necklace, while holding a white smartphone. Her long dark hair is blowing slightly. Behind her to the right, a young man laughs excitedly with his mouth open, wearing a backward orange baseball cap, a bright blue windbreaker over a green t-shirt, light khaki pants, and a silver chain. He is holding two black smartphones, one in each hand, with one raised high in the air. The image features bright flash lighting, a slight wide-angle lens distortion, and a smooth gradient background transitioning from hot pink to white.
